---
title: "SEIR with All-or-Nothing Vaccination"
description: "Models SEIR with all-or-nothing vaccination producing herd immunity, including vital dynamics and three vaccination routes (initial coverage, campaigns, newborns)."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2018-10-01"
categories: [SEIR, vaccination, vital dynamics, herd immunity, intermediate]
order: 3
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
